data.content: Fixed both review-rejected issues: (1) resolveStatsDir() now always uses process.cwd()/.foolery-logs instead of ~/.config/foolery/logs in production, satisfying the working-directory storage requirement. (2) classifyIterationSuccess() no longer treats terminal states or same-step queue states as success — only next-queue-state and prior-queue-state transitions qualify, matching the spec exactly. Added priorQueueStateForStep() to workflows.ts. Tests: prior-queue success (review rejection), same-state=failure, terminal=failure, storage path verification. Sanity gates: tsc, 2089 tests, build, lint all pass.
